name: Allowed NetLogon Connections via Group Policy - CVE2020-1472
description: Allowed NetLogon connections from a list of patched and unpatched systems via a Group Policy setting. Detection of allowed NetLogon connections from unpatched systems to a domain controller when the CVE-2020-1472 patch is enabled and a group policy is applied. It may indicate a configuration mistake, which may be a potential risk for the environment.

prompts.prompt: Investigate the allowed NetLogon connection from the unpatched system `{source_address}` to the domain controller `{destination_address}` at `{timestamp}`. The connection was allowed via Group Policy, but the system should be patched for the CVE-2020-1472 vulnerability. Determine if this is a misconfiguration and if the system should be on the network. Provide a summary of your findings and recommend immediate remediation steps to prevent this type of connection.

parameters.name: source_address
parameters.description: The IP address of the unpatched system.

parameters.name: destination_address
parameters.description: The IP address of the domain controller.
